# Commonweave

> Commonweave is an open directory and framework for mapping organizations building cooperative, commons-based, democratic, ecological, mutual-aid, and post-labor infrastructure. As of 2026-04-25: 164,783 candidate organizations across 172 countries, 27,217 geocoded map points, 10,824 records scoring `alignment_score >= 5`. US/UK now account for ~13.2% of records (down from ~83% before the April 2026 ingest waves).

Commonweave needs help from humans and AI-assisted contributors. The highest-value work is auditing the recent Wave A ingest (Brazil mapa_oscs, Australia ACNC, Bulgaria Wikidata NPO) for false positives, expanding informal/hybrid coverage (the new long tail is mostly registry-formal), strengthening citations, improving the map, adding edge provenance, and red-teaming the framework. Generic summaries are not contributions. Concrete improvements are.

## Core Documents

- [README](https://github.com/simonlpaige/commonweave/blob/master/README.md): Project overview, directory status, framework, contribution paths.
- [CRITIQUE](https://github.com/simonlpaige/commonweave/blob/master/CRITIQUE.md): Section-by-section honest audit of weaknesses. Read this; it tells you where the work is.
- [AGENTS.md](https://github.com/simonlpaige/commonweave/blob/master/AGENTS.md): Instructions for AI agents and AI-assisted contributors.
- [AI Challenge](https://github.com/simonlpaige/commonweave/blob/master/AI-CHALLENGE.md): Public challenge framing and contribution tracks.
- [Agent Tasks](https://github.com/simonlpaige/commonweave/blob/master/AGENT-TASKS.json): Machine-readable task list.
- [Claims Ledger](https://github.com/simonlpaige/commonweave/blob/master/CLAIMS.md): Specific, falsifiable claims with evidence and confidence.
- [Falsifiers](https://github.com/simonlpaige/commonweave/blob/master/FALSIFIERS.md): What would prove this project wrong.
- [Attack Vectors](https://github.com/simonlpaige/commonweave/blob/master/ATTACK-VECTORS.md): How the project could be captured, abused, or decay.
- [Steelman Alternatives](https://github.com/simonlpaige/commonweave/blob/master/STEELMAN-ALTERNATIVES.md): Strongest competing theories.

## Data

- [Data Contribution Guide](https://github.com/simonlpaige/commonweave/blob/master/data/CONTRIBUTING-DATA.md): How to add or verify organizations.
- [Per-country search index](https://github.com/simonlpaige/commonweave/tree/master/data/search): Browsable JSON files used by the directory.

## Web Surfaces

- [Directory](https://commonweave.earth/directory.html): Searchable organization directory.
- [Map](https://commonweave.earth/map.html): Interactive organization/network map.

## Best First Tasks

- Verify one underrepresented country (≤50 records; most of the 172 countries qualify). Fix or correct 10. PR.
- Audit the Wave A ingest: Brazil mapa_oscs, Australia ACNC, or Bulgaria Wikidata NPO -- spot-check 20 records each for framework-fit and false positives.
- Add a high-confidence-only map toggle (Tier B + `alignment_score >= 5`).
- Add edge provenance metadata to `data/build_map_v2.py`.
- Audit auto-classified `legibility=formal` records (~138,803) or backfill `legibility=unknown` records (~25,980).
- Fill one `[NEEDS EXAMPLE]` cell in the README governance matrix.
- Add one serious falsifier to `FALSIFIERS.md`.

## Optional

- [Long-form digest (llms-full.txt)](https://github.com/simonlpaige/commonweave/blob/master/llms-full.txt): Longer machine-readable summary with framework and data details.
